svg.aria-label: System architecture diagram for the Mayo Clinic Scheduling Assistant
svg.title: Mayo Clinic Scheduling Assistant — System Architecture

g.text: Single-page widget served from Vercel (index.html). No KB. No prompt assembly. Smaller payload.
Most patients can request an appointment
online or by phone — no referral needed.
Request, prepare, or change a visit
api/chat.js · Node 18+ · zero dependencies · builds the system prompt server-side
18 paraphrased Mayo entries · loaded once per warm container · edit + redeploy to update
▸ Base rules (no medical advice, no booking)
▸ KB-only · no PHI · no booking · no diagnosis
